blocks.speaker: Coach Briggs
blocks.content: Jenkins. Post route. Full speed. No hesitation at the break.
I ran it. Clean. Didn't think about Daniel, didn't think about Friday, didn't think about anything. Just the route.
Again. Cleaner. Jonathan was watching from the sideline and gave me the smallest nod — the one that meant something.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Like you stopped waiting to see what's gonna happen and started just — doing it. On the route. You broke before I even threw.

blocks.speaker: Jonathan
blocks.content: Everybody hears that. Not everybody stops hesitating.

I didn't tell him what was different. I didn't fully understand it myself. Something had shifted — on the steps, in the hallway, at the theater. Something in me had decided to stop waiting to be ready.

blocks.prompt: Jonathan says you stopped hesitating. He wants to know what changed.

options.label: "It's a lot of things at once. I'll tell you later."
"Coach said no hesitation." Leave it there.
